languages.text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

traits.locale_text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

languages.text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.
languages.original_text: Себериан слишком полагается на ксеносский клинок. Это мешает ему довериться союзникам.

traits.locale_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

languages.text: Seberian hat zu großes Vertrauen in die Xenos-Klinge. Dadurch verlässt er sich nicht auf seine Verbündeten.
languages.original_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian hat zu großes Vertrauen in die Xenos-Klinge. Dadurch verlässt er sich nicht auf seine Verbündeten.

languages.text: Seberian a une confiance excessive dans l'épée xénos. À cause d'elle, il ignore ses alliés.
languages.original_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian a une confiance excessive dans l'épée xénos. À cause d'elle, il ignore ses alliés.

languages.text: 塞贝里安太过信任那把异形刀刃了，这让他无法信赖自己的盟友。
languages.original_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安太过信任那把异形刀刃了，这让他无法信赖自己的盟友。

languages.text: El exceso de confianza que Seberian ha depositado en la espada xenos le impide recurrir a sus aliados.
languages.original_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

traits.locale_text: El exceso de confianza que Seberian ha depositado en la espada xenos le impide recurrir a sus aliados.

languages.text: セベリアンはゼノスの剣に頼りすぎている。そのせいで、彼は味方を信じることができない。
languages.original_text: Seberian relies too much on the Xenos blade. It prevents him from trusting his allies.

languages.text: Seberian, zeno kılıcına çok fazla güveniyor. Bu onun müttefiklerine güvenmesini engelliyor.
languages.original_text: Seberian places too much trust in the xenos blade. This prevents him from relying upon his allies.

traits.locale_text: Seberian, zeno kılıcına çok fazla güveniyor. Bu onun müttefiklerine güvenmesini engelliyor.
